validation.passwordMin8Login: Password must be at least 8 characters long
validation.passwordHasLetter: Must contain at least one letter
validation.passwordHasDigit: Must contain at least one digit
validation.nameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or less

login.title: Sign in
login.resetBanner: Password changed. Sign in with your new password.

forgotPassword.title: Password recovery
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account with that email exists, you will receive a message with reset instructions.
forgotPassword.hint: Enter the email you signed up with. We will send a password reset link.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.linkInvalidOrExpired: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new password reset link.

verifyEmail.title: Email verification
verifyEmail.resendHint: Enter the email you signed up with to receive a new message.
verifyEmail.resendSent: If an account exists, you will receive a message shortly.
verifyEmail.resendError: Failed to send the message. Try again later

dashboard.pendingBanner: Verify your email for full access.
dashboard.description: This is your dashboard. More features will appear in upcoming epics.

emailVerification.title: Email verification
emailVerification.sent: If an account exists, you will receive a message shortly.
emailVerification.error: Failed to send the message. Try again later

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: Terminating all sessions will sign you out on this and all other devices.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: This action is irreversible. All your projects, bots, and subscribers will be deleted.

emptyState.title: Create your first project
emptyState.description: Projects group your bots, subscribers, and broadcasts. Let's start with the first one.

create.title: New project
create.limitReachedTooltip: You've reached the limit of 5 active projects. Delete one to create a new one.

delete.modalIntro: This moves the project to Recently deleted. After 7 days it will be deleted permanently.
delete.typeNameLabel: Type the project name to confirm

form.tokenPlaceholder: Paste your bot token from BotFather

connected.testMessageHint: To enable test message, write /start to your bot in Telegram first.

modal.title: Disconnect bot?
modal.body: Disconnect bot {'@'}{username}? Incoming messages will stop and the webhook will be removed. You can reconnect anytime.
